blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,676 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
